title: Synthesizing Agentic AI
concept: Reviewing the entire stack: perceive-reason-act loop, planners, memory stores, tool pipelines, and multi-agent teams.

exercises.prompt: What is the first step in the perceive-reason-act loop in Agentic AI?
exercises.explain: The first step in the perceive-reason-act loop is to perceive, which means gathering information from the environment.

cards.title: What is Agentic AI?
cards.body: Agentic AI refers to systems that can perceive their environment, reason about it, and take actions based on their reasoning.

cards.title: The Perceive-Reason-Act Loop
cards.body: This loop describes how Agentic AI systems scan their surroundings, think about what they see, and then decide on actions to take.

cards.title: Like a Smart Fox
cards.body: Think of Agentic AI like a clever fox. It sees (perceives) the chickens, thinks about how to approach (reasons), and then decides to sneak in (act)!

cards.title: Everyday Example
cards.body: When your smart home device listens for your command (perceive), thinks of the best response (reason), and then turns on the lights (act), that's an Agentic AI in action!

cards.title: Myth: Agents Always Act Alone
cards.body: It's a misconception that AI agents work alone; they can collaborate in teams for more complex tasks!

cards.title: The Agent Stack
cards.body: The Agent Stack helps illustrate how different components work together: perception, reasoning, planning, memory, tools, and teamwork.

exercises.prompt: Which component helps AI remember previous actions?
exercises.explain: Memory Stores are crucial for AI because they allow it to remember past actions and improve future decisions.

exercises.prompt: True or False: AI agents only rely on their programming and do not learn from their environment.
exercises.explain: This statement is false because AI agents actually learn and adapt from their environment.

exercises.prompt: In the perceive-reason-act loop, the AI first needs to ____ the environment.
exercises.sentence: In the perceive-reason-act loop, the AI first needs to perceive the environment.
exercises.explain: 'Perceive' is the step where the AI gathers information before taking any action.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following best describes a multi-agent team?

options.text: A group of AI working alone
AI systems cooperating to solve problems
One AI that does all tasks

exercises.explain: The correct answer is that a multi-agent team refers to AI systems working together to tackle complex problems that one agent might struggle with alone.

exercises.prompt: What do you combine to create an effective Agentic AI system?

options.text: Perceiving, reasoning, and acting, plus planners and teamwork

exercises.explain: An effective Agentic AI system requires a combination of perceiving, reasoning, and acting, plus planners and the ability to work in multi-agent teams, to be truly effective.
